g.text: DRE 3D Framework -- Architecture Compliance & Enforcement Strategy
Is it a bug in the code?
- Forbidden SQL keywords in new code
- Full source tree scan (not just diff)
- Security hotspots in any new code
- Tech debt exceptions not fixed in time
- New capability not backed by spec entry
Architecture as Code: the spec is the law.
Diagrams are the explanation. Code is the implementation.
All three must stay in sync.
Never change code to deviate from architecture silently.
Always choose one of: fix code | update spec+PUML | register exception.
Compliance is NOT a one-time gate
It is continuous enforcement at every commit, every PR,
every merge, and every quarterly review. Exceptions are
debt, not permissions. They expire and must be renewed.
